name: Production Site A
description: Flagship manufacturing facility dedicated to passenger and light truck tires. Integrates advanced robotics, IoT sensors, and AI analytics across multiple production lines to achieve industry-leading efficiency and quality. Features a fully automated warehouse and state-of-the-art R&D center on premises.
path: Smart Tire Production/Production Site A
full_text: Production Site A - Flagship manufacturing facility dedicated to passenger and light truck tires. Integrates advanced robotics, IoT sensors, and AI analytics across multiple production lines to achieve industry-leading efficiency and quality. Features a fully automated warehouse and state-of-the-art R&D center on premises.

name: Production Line 1
description: High-volume manufacturing line specializing in premium, high-performance passenger tires. Incorporates six Smart Tire Machines, ten Curing Presses, and two Tire Uniformity Machines, all interconnected by an automated conveyor system. Utilizes real-time data analytics for proactive maintenance and quality control, minimizing defects and maximizing throughput.

full_text: Production Line 1 - High-volume manufacturing line specializing in premium, high-performance passenger tires. Incorporates six Smart Tire Machines, ten Curing Presses, and two Tire Uniformity Machines, all interconnected by an automated conveyor system. Utilizes real-time data analytics for proactive maintenance and quality control, minimizing defects and maximizing throughput.

name: VMI MAXX 1000
description: Next-generation single-stage tire building machine with integrated component preparation. Employs precision servo drives and advanced vision systems to build complex tire structures with exceptional accuracy and minimal material waste. Capable of producing up to 12 tires per hour, adaptable for various rim sizes and profiles, and features self-diagnostic capabilities.
path: Smart Tire Production/Devices/VMI MAXX 1000
full_text: VMI MAXX 1000 - Next-generation single-stage tire building machine with integrated component preparation. Employs precision servo drives and advanced vision systems to build complex tire structures with exceptional accuracy and minimal material waste. Capable of producing up to 12 tires per hour, adaptable for various rim sizes and profiles, and features self-diagnostic capabilities.

name: Smart Cutter S900
description: Automated precision cutter designed for preparing rubber components like tread and sidewall strips. Integrated with the mixing system for on-demand cutting, reducing material handling and improving throughput efficiency.

description: A specialized machine used to accurately cut and shape rubber components. It ensures dimensional accuracy critical for subsequent tire building stages.
path: Smart Tire Production/Production Site A/Tire Production Line 1/Edger Precision Unit
full_text: Edger Precision Unit - A specialized machine used to accurately cut and shape rubber components. It ensures dimensional accuracy critical for subsequent tire building stages.

name: Smart Curing Cell 1
description: This advanced curing press cell consists of multiple individual presses operating in parallel, each equipped with real-time temperature and pressure monitoring. It handles a diverse range of tire sizes, converting 'Green Tires' into finished products through a tightly controlled vulcanization process critical for material property development and tire durability. Process Type: Batch, Cycle-based (~15-25 min depending on tire size). Key Physics: Heat transfer and pressure distribution are precisely managed to achieve optimal cross-linking of rubber polymers.
path: Smart Tire Production/Production Site A/Tire Production Line 1/Smart Curing Cell 1
full_text: Smart Curing Cell 1 - This advanced curing press cell consists of multiple individual presses operating in parallel, each equipped with real-time temperature and pressure monitoring. It handles a diverse range of tire sizes, converting 'Green Tires' into finished products through a tightly controlled vulcanization process critical for material property development and tire durability. Process Type: Batch, Cycle-based (~15-25 min depending on tire size). Key Physics: Heat transfer and pressure distribution are precisely managed to achieve optimal cross-linking of rubber polymers.

name: Global HQ Production Site A
description: The primary and largest manufacturing facility, serving as the flagship for smart production technologies. This site integrates AI-driven predictive maintenance, advanced robotics for tire assembly, and a fully automated quality inspection system across its three main production lines. It specializes in mass production of passenger and light truck tires, with a strategic focus on energy efficiency and waste reduction throughout its extensive operations.
path: Smart Tire Production/Production Site A
full_text: Global HQ Production Site A - The primary and largest manufacturing facility, serving as the flagship for smart production technologies. This site integrates AI-driven predictive maintenance, advanced robotics for tire assembly, and a fully automated quality inspection system across its three main production lines. It specializes in mass production of passenger and light truck tires, with a strategic focus on energy efficiency and waste reduction throughout its extensive operations.

name: TUM-Advanced QA 4
description: A high-precision quality control machine that measures radial and lateral force variation, conicity, and ply steer of finished tires. It employs laser scanners and force transducers to detect minute imperfections and imbalances that could affect vehicle handling and ride comfort. This data is fed back to upstream machines for process optimization, ensuring every tire meets stringent global quality standards before shipment. Process Type: Discrete, Cycle-based (~30s). Key Physics: Dynamic force measurement and geometric analysis under simulated load conditions.
path: Smart Tire Production/Production Site B/Tire Production Line 3/TUM-Advanced QA 4
full_text: TUM-Advanced QA 4 - A high-precision quality control machine that measures radial and lateral force variation, conicity, and ply steer of finished tires. It employs laser scanners and force transducers to detect minute imperfections and imbalances that could affect vehicle handling and ride comfort. This data is fed back to upstream machines for process optimization, ensuring every tire meets stringent global quality standards before shipment. Process Type: Discrete, Cycle-based (~30s). Key Physics: Dynamic force measurement and geometric analysis under simulated load conditions.

name: High Shear Compound Mixer
description: This state-of-the-art internal mixer is designed for high-efficiency batch mixing of various rubber compounds, carbon black, silica, and other additives. It features advanced temperature control and rotor design to ensure homogeneous dispersion of materials, critical for achieving desired tire performance properties like grip and wear resistance. The mixing process is fully automated, with real-time viscosity and energy consumption monitoring. Process Type: Batch, Cycle-based (~5-10 min per batch). Key Physics: Viscoelastic deformation and shear forces drive material blending and chemical reactions.
path: Smart Tire Production/Mixing Department/High Shear Compound Mixer
full_text: High Shear Compound Mixer - This state-of-the-art internal mixer is designed for high-efficiency batch mixing of various rubber compounds, carbon black, silica, and other additives. It features advanced temperature control and rotor design to ensure homogeneous dispersion of materials, critical for achieving desired tire performance properties like grip and wear resistance. The mixing process is fully automated, with real-time viscosity and energy consumption monitoring. Process Type: Batch, Cycle-based (~5-10 min per batch). Key Physics: Viscoelastic deformation and shear forces drive material blending and chemical reactions.

name: Tire Uniformity Machine (TUM) A2
description: This advanced Tire Uniformity Machine (TUM) performs dynamic testing on finished tires. It measures force variations, conicity, and radial/lateral run-out at high speeds. Data from this machine is crucial for ensuring ride comfort and handling performance, and it feeds back into the production process for continuous improvement.
path: Smart Tire Production/Production Site A/Tire Production Line 1/Tire Uniformity Machine (TUM) A2
full_text: Tire Uniformity Machine (TUM) A2 - This advanced Tire Uniformity Machine (TUM) performs dynamic testing on finished tires. It measures force variations, conicity, and radial/lateral run-out at high speeds. Data from this machine is crucial for ensuring ride comfort and handling performance, and it feeds back into the production process for continuous improvement.

name: Smart Tire Machine T1
description: High-speed discrete automation asset responsible for the precision assembly of 'Green Tires' from multiple uncured rubber components. This machine operates on a cycle-based process, typically completing a tire in approximately 40-50 seconds. Key physical principles governing its operation include precise tension control of material feeds and intricate mechanical alignment, which are paramount in determining the final tire's uniformity and balance.
path: Smart Tire Production/Production Site A/Tire Production Line 1/Smart Tire Machine T1
full_text: Smart Tire Machine T1 - High-speed discrete automation asset responsible for the precision assembly of 'Green Tires' from multiple uncured rubber components. This machine operates on a cycle-based process, typically completing a tire in approximately 40-50 seconds. Key physical principles governing its operation include precise tension control of material feeds and intricate mechanical alignment, which are paramount in determining the final tire's uniformity and balance.

name: Production Site A
description: Our flagship manufacturing facility, integrating cutting-edge smart production technologies. This site focuses on high-volume production of premium passenger and light truck tires, utilizing multiple automated production lines. It includes dedicated departments for mixing, component preparation, tire building, curing, and final inspection, all supported by a sophisticated central control system.
path: Smart Tire Production/Production Site A
full_text: Production Site A - Our flagship manufacturing facility, integrating cutting-edge smart production technologies. This site focuses on high-volume production of premium passenger and light truck tires, utilizing multiple automated production lines. It includes dedicated departments for mixing, component preparation, tire building, curing, and final inspection, all supported by a sophisticated central control system.

name: Boiler System B2 Redundancy
description: This system comprises two high-efficiency industrial boilers operating in a redundant configuration. Its primary function is to generate high-pressure steam essential for the vulcanization process in the curing presses, as well as providing hot water for various auxiliary processes. Advanced controls optimize fuel consumption and minimize emissions, ensuring a reliable and environmentally responsible energy supply for the entire site.

full_text: Boiler System B2 Redundancy - This system comprises two high-efficiency industrial boilers operating in a redundant configuration. name: Mixer 1
description: A Banbury mixer used for initial raw rubber compounding. It incorporates carbon black, silica, and other chemicals into the base polymer. Critical for developing the tire's foundational mechanical properties, operating at high temperatures and pressures to ensure homogeneous dispersion.

description: This comprehensive boiler system provides steam and hot water for all vulcanization presses and other heated processes within Production Site B.
